title: Crusty Woodfired Mediterranean Pork Belly Bake
description: A hearty, satisfying dish featuring woodfired pork belly slices, perfect for a post-workout meal, with vegan-friendly alternatives available. This recipe combines the richness of pork belly with the brightness of Mediterranean flavors.

ingredients.name: pork belly slices
ingredients.notes: or vegan alternative such as portobello mushrooms

instructions: Preheat the woodfired oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Place the pork belly slices in a large bowl and brush the olive oil mixture evenly over both sides of the slices.
Let the pork belly slices marinate for at least 30 minutes.
In a separate bowl, mix together yeast and woodfired bread crumbs.
Remove the pork belly slices from the marinade and coat each slice in the yeast and bread crumb mixture, pressing gently to adhere.
Place the coated pork belly slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the pork belly slices in the preheated woodfired oven for 25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the pork belly slices from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the crusty woodfired Mediterranean pork belly bake hot, garnished with fresh herbs and lemon wedges if desired.
